creator: Richard.Frewin@astro.cf.ac.uk
text:
On Sun 28 Nov 2010 at 21:46, Fabian Keil (fk@fabiankeil.de) wrote:
> Hello Richard,
> 
> I run into the same problem a while ago, worked around it somehow
> and forgot about it until I stumbled across your problem report
> while investigating a similar problem:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=152641
> 
> Anyway, can you try the attached fix?
> Works for me on FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT.
> 
> Fabian

Yep - that seems to stop the seg faults on my 8.1-STABLE amd64 (from Nov
13th) with ports tree updated yesterday ... ripping a test CD now.

   Many Thanks,

      Richard.
